title: Coupon applied twice on page refresh
description: When user refreshes the checkout page after applying a coupon, the discount is applied again doubling the discount amount.
root_cause: race condition in client-side coupon state management; missing idempotency check on server
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Add item to cart. 2. Apply coupon. 3. Refresh page. 4. Observe double discount.

title: Expired coupon accepted when applied before midnight
description: Coupons expiring at midnight were still accepted when applied at 23:58 and order completed at 00:03 next day due to timezone mismatch.
root_cause: timezone handling – server uses UTC, coupon expiry stored in local timezone without conversion
steps_to_reproduce: Apply coupon near expiry boundary across midnight timezone change

title: Coupon discount not rolled back on payment failure
description: When payment fails after coupon is marked as used, the coupon remains marked as used and cannot be reused by the customer.
root_cause: rollback not implemented – coupon usage updated before payment confirmation; missing transaction management
steps_to_reproduce: Apply coupon, proceed to payment, simulate payment failure. Try to reuse coupon.

title: SQL injection via coupon code field
description: Coupon code field was vulnerable to SQL injection via crafted input: ' OR '1'='1
root_cause: sql injection – coupon validation query used string concatenation instead of parameterised queries

title: Negative total when 100% discount coupon applied to order with items only
description: Applying a 100% discount coupon resulted in a total of -$5 (negative) due to tax not being excluded from the discount calculation.
root_cause: decimal rounding – discount applied to subtotal+tax instead of subtotal only; missing floor at $0.01
steps_to_reproduce: Apply 100% coupon to order with taxable items. Observe negative total.

title: Order service not notified of coupon discount – incorrect revenue reporting
description: The OrderCreated event does not include the coupon code or discount amount, causing revenue reporting to show full price instead of discounted price.
root_cause: event definition – OrderCreated payload schema missing discount_code and discount_amount fields
steps_to_reproduce: Apply coupon, complete order, check order event payload in event log.

title: Coupon validation API not rate-limited – brute force possible
description: The POST /api/coupons/validate endpoint has no rate limiting, allowing automated enumeration of valid coupon codes.
root_cause: dependency – no rate limiting middleware applied to coupon validation endpoint
steps_to_reproduce: Send 1000 requests/minute to /api/coupons/validate. Observe no throttling.
